citations.description: Ticket comments array is empty ([]), status is 'in_progress', no Gerrit change URL or vote record found in ticket data.

findings.criterion: [operator-attested] The change is merged to `main` via Gerrit with `LLM-Review +1` and `Verified +1` (evidence: the merged change's Gerrit vote record; out-of-session).
findings.detail: The ticket has no comments and no recorded attestation of a Gerrit merge with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1. The ticket status is still 'in_progress'. No reference id, vote record, or timestamp is present.
findings.remediation: Record a ticket comment naming the Gerrit change URL/id, the observed LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 vote outcomes, and the merge timestamp. Example: 'Merged at https://gerrit.example.com/c/rebar/+/NNNNN; LLM-Review +1 from <reviewer> on <date>, Verified +1 from CI on <date>.'

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
